items.title: Raptors' Alijah Martin: Receives qualifying offer
items.author: CBS Sports
items.body_excerpt: Raptors' Alijah Martin: Receives qualifying offer CBS Sports

items.title: The Toronto Raptors have tendered two-way qualifying offers to Chucky Hepburn and Alijah Martin, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Toronto Raptors have tendered two-way qualifying offers to Chucky Hepburn and Alijah Martin, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Both Hepburn and Martin will now be restricted free agents this summer. @mikeascotto.bsky.social reported Hepburn intends to sign his QO to return to Toronto.
